issues.title: Maps may show empty or broken on first load
issues.description: The ChoroplethMap and ClusterMap components may fail to load tiles or show empty black containers on first visit. A first-time visitor may think the maps are broken.
reproduction_steps: Observe map cards during initial load
issues.expected: Loading skeleton or spinner while map tiles load
issues.actual: Empty black containers until tiles load; no loading indicator

issues.title: No explanation of map symbols
issues.description: A first-time visitor does not know what the dots on the cluster map represent or how the choropleth color scale works.
issues.expected: Map legend explaining symbols and color scale

summary: Locations page shows maps but first-time visitors may see empty states and don't understand the map symbols.
